Introduction
    Strong-willed Fei Yu befriends arrogant rich girl Lin Ye. Hefan Zhang, Lin's fiance, loves Fei who rescued him as a child, stirring Lin's jealousy. Seeking revenge through Fei's boyfriend, the half-sisters' bond is revealed.
